detailedDescription:
12 Zen 4 cores with 3D V-Cache stacking.
A strong pick for gaming and simulation workloads that benefit from large cache.
additionalSpecs:
Cores: 12 | Threads: 24
L2 Cache: 12MB | L3 Cache: 140MB (64MB + 64MB + 12MB 3D V-Cache across 2 CCDs)
Socket: AM5 (LGA1718) | Architecture: Zen 4
Process Node: TSMC 5nm (CCD) + 6nm (IOD)
Memory: DDR5-5200 dual-channel
PCIe: 28 lanes (PCIe 5.0 x16 + PCIe 5.0 x4 NVMe)
Integrated Graphics: AMD Radeon RDNA 2 (2 CUs)
Max Temp: 89°C | Unlocked Multiplier: Yes
